records.snippet_en: bilty of ADM. ADM is responsible for the preparation and fai presentation of the GHG statement in accordance with the criteria. Apex’s sole responsibility was to provide independent verification on the accuracy of the GHG emissions reported. and on the underlying systems and processes used to collect, analyze and review the information. Apex is responsible for expressing an opinion on the GHG statement based on the verificabon Ventication activites applied in a limited level of assurance venfication are less extensive in nature, timing and extent than im a reasonable level of assurance verification. Boundaries of the reporting company GHG emissions covered by the verification: © — Operational Control © Wortdwide * Exclusions include a small number (<10) of leased office spaces Types of GHGs: COz, NiO, CHs, HFCs, PFCs, SFe, other HCFCs GHG Emissions Statement: * Scope 1: 12,600,000 metric tons of CO2 equivalent * Scope 2 (Location-Based): 1,990,000 metric tons of CO: equivalent © Scope 2 (Market-Based): 2,030,000 metric tons of COz equivaient * Biogenic Emissions: 3,750,000 metric tons CO» + Biogenic Carbon Dioxide Sequestered: 544,000 metric tons CO2 * Scope 3: © Category 1 Purchased Goods and Services — 89,600,000 metric tons of CO» equivalent © Category 2 Capital Goods - 161,000 metric tons of CO; equivalent © Category 3 — Fuel and Energy-related Activities - 1,790,000 metric tons of CO; equivalent © Category 4 Upstream Transportation and Distribution (Intermare and some field aggregation for commodities in Category 1) ~ 6,550,000 metric tons of CO» equivalent © Category 5 - Waste Generated in Operations - 220,000 metric tons of CO) equivalent © Category 10 — Processing of Sold Goods — 9,200,000 metric tons of CO equivalent Data and information supporting the Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions statement were generally histonical in nature. Data and information supporting the Scope 3 GHG emissions statement were in some instances estimated.
